title: DelayEffect
description: Echo/delay effect using a Web Audio `DelayNode` with a feedback loop and dry/wet mix. The feedback path feeds the delayed signal back into itself, producing repeating echoes that decay naturally. Setting `feedback` near its maximum of 0.95 produces a long, prominent tail; lower values create a single slap-back echo.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Echo/delay effect using a Web Audio `DelayNode` with a feedback loop and dry/wet mix. The feedback path feeds the delayed signal back into itself, producing repeating echoes that decay naturally. Setting `feedback` near its maximum of 0.95 produces a long, prominent tail; lower values create a single slap-back echo.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Disconnects all audio nodes and releases resources. Must be called when the effect is no longer needed.

members.name: delaySeconds
members.description: Delay time in seconds. Range 0..5, default 0.3.

members.name: feedback
members.description: Fraction of the delayed signal fed back into the delay input. Range 0..0.95, default 0.4.

members.name: inputNode
members.description: The node where audio enters this effect.

members.name: outputNode
members.description: The node where audio exits this effect.

members.name: ready
members.description: Resolves when the effect is fully initialized. Defaults to immediately-resolved for sync effects.

members.name: wet
members.description: Wet (delayed) mix level, 0..1. The dry level is automatically 1 - wet. Default 0.5.
